cfjStatement: Fabricate integrated circuits and discrete semiconductor devices on wafers at nanometer-scale precision with yield-acceptable electrical performance, then package and qualify them for sale

vnUnits.name: Semiconductor Device Manufacturing Ecosystem
vnUnits.functionalJob: Economic community of IDMs, foundries, fabless, OSAT, equipment OEMs, materials suppliers, utilities

vnUnits.name: Wafer Preparation
vnUnits.functionalJob: Prepare clean defect-free substrate; incoming inspection, clean, epi

vnUnits.name: Lithography & Patterning
vnUnits.functionalJob: Transfer circuit pattern onto wafer via photoresist coat, expose, develop

vnUnits.name: Etch & Clean
vnUnits.functionalJob: Remove material per pattern; strip resist; post-etch clean

vnUnits.name: Doping & Implantation
vnUnits.functionalJob: Modify electrical properties of Si lattice via ion implant + anneal

vnUnits.name: Deposition & Growth
vnUnits.functionalJob: Deposit insulating/conductive films (oxidation, CVD, PVD, ALD, epi)

vnUnits.name: CMP
vnUnits.functionalJob: Planarize wafer surface between layers; polish + post-CMP clean

vnUnits.name: Metallization & Interconnect
vnUnits.functionalJob: Build conductive interconnect stack (Cu damascene, Al)

vnUnits.name: Wafer Probe & Sort
vnUnits.functionalJob: Electrically test each die on wafer; yield feedback

vnUnits.name: Assembly & Packaging
vnUnits.functionalJob: Singulate and package die into shippable IC

vnUnits.name: Final Test & Qualification
vnUnits.functionalJob: ATE, burn-in, reliability screen on packaged ICs

vnUnits.name: Electrical Power Infrastructure
vnUnits.functionalJob: Horizontal. Deliver clean, continuous, ride-through MV/LV power to every tool and the cleanroom envelope

vnUnits.name: Ultrapure Water & Wastewater
vnUnits.functionalJob: Horizontal. UPW supply, chemical wastewater, solvent recovery

vnUnits.name: Process Gases & Chemicals
vnUnits.functionalJob: Horizontal. Bulk/specialty gas yards, chemical distribution, abatement

vnUnits.name: Cleanroom Environmental Control
vnUnits.functionalJob: Horizontal. ISO 1–5 HVAC, AMC scrubbing, vibration isolation

vnUnits.name: MES & Industrial IT/OT
vnUnits.functionalJob: Horizontal. Recipe mgmt, equipment integration, SCADA, cybersecurity

vnUnits.name: HV/MV Incoming Substation
vnUnits.functionalJob: 110 kV → MV step-down; utility interface; Type A plant cert

vnUnits.name: MV Switchgear & Distribution
vnUnits.functionalJob: 10–36 kV switchgear, busbar, protection, metering. MEIN SOLAR SECONDARY (as part of BESS scope)

vnUnits.functionalJob: Facility/tool-level double-conversion UPS with battery backup

vnUnits.name: Dynamic UPS / Flywheel
vnUnits.functionalJob: Rotating kinetic-energy UPS; sub-cycle ride-through + diesel ride-over
